summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, closes, labels, comments, or fix PRs are planned. Open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer review or proof follow-up; closed listed PRs are recorded as already closed; the open security-sensitive linked Teams provider PR is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with proof and no duplicate canonical in this shard; keep for maintainer review.
Draft maintainer-owned PR with a distinct plugin metadata projection scope; no closure or merge is allowed in this plan.
Draft maintainer-owned PR with distinct command-spec projection scope; keep for maintainer review.
Focused contributor PR tied to an open issue and passing proof; keep for maintainer review, not close or merge.
Maintainer-owned CODEOWNERS governance change requires maintainer review; no close-style action is justified.
Small related logging cleanup, but proof is missing and #89982 is not a hydrated canonical replacement; keep open rather than close.

Distinct provider catalog/onboarding repair with passing checks; keep for maintainer review rather than close.
Security-sensitive open linked PR is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should route to central OpenClaw security handling.
